exec: // runId формат: только [a-z0-9], без точки, начинается с буквы — чтобы проходить compute name regex

item.name: AUTHZ-SA-NET-GT-A1 — [ALLOW] Get seed-network in project-A1 (granted resource) as service-account-A (vpc-editor on project-A1)
AUTHZ-SA-NET-GT-A1 :: get

exec: pm.test('[AUTHZ-SA-NET-GT-A1] ALLOW: not Unauthenticated (16)', () => pm.expect(_j && _j.code, JSON.stringify(_j)).to.not.equal(16));

item.name: AUTHZ-SA-NET-LS-A2-DENY — [DENY] List networks ?projectId=A2 (cross-project, no project-viewer) → 403 gated List as service-account-A (vpc-editor on project-A1)
AUTHZ-SA-NET-LS-A2-DENY :: get

exec: let j; try { j = pm.response.json(); } catch(e) { j = null; }
pm.test('[AUTHZ-SA-NET-LS-A2-DENY] DENY: grpc code 7 (PERMISSION_DENIED)', () => pm.expect(j && j.code, JSON.stringify(j)).to.equal(7));
pm.test('[AUTHZ-SA-NET-LS-A2-DENY] DENY: message contains permission denied', () => pm.expect((j && j.message || '').toLowerCase()).to.contain('permission denied'));

item.name: AUTHZ-SA-NET-GT-B1 — [DENY] Get seed-network in project-B1 (cross-account, no grant) as service-account-A (vpc-editor on project-A1)

exec: let j; try { j = pm.response.json(); } catch(e) { j = null; }
pm.test('[AUTHZ-SA-NET-GT-B1] READ-DENY: grpc code 5 (NOT_FOUND, not 7)', () => pm.expect(j && j.code, JSON.stringify(j)).to.equal(5));
pm.test('[AUTHZ-SA-NET-GT-B1] READ-DENY: no deny_reasons leak', () => pm.expect(JSON.stringify(j || {}).toLowerCase()).to.not.include('deny_reasons'));
